info.title: Simple Accounting API
info.description: Accounting system backend by Naresh Sah

schema.title: Response List Ledger Groups Ledgers Companies  Company Id  Ledger Groups Get
Response List Ledgers Ledgers Companies  Company Id  Ledgers Get
Response List Vouchers Vouchers Companies  Company Id  Vouchers Get

post.description:
Seed a basic chart of accounts for the given company.

Creates standard ledger groups and a few common ledgers under each.
If a group/ledger with the same name already exists for this company,
it will be reused and not duplicated.
